steps.title: Use the triangle area formula
steps.content: The area of a triangle is one-half the product of its base and corresponding height.

steps.title: Substitute and simplify
steps.content: The base is $12$ centimeters and the height is $64$ centimeters. $$A=\frac{1}{2}(12)(64)$$ $$A=6(64)$$ $$A=384$$ The answer is B.
